title: DART-Eval Regulatory DNA Benchmark Data

data_urls.access_notes: Synapse authentication and accepted terms may be required.

instructions: Inspect the DART-Eval repository for task definitions and loaders.
Authenticate with Synapse and download processed task files and genome references through upstream instructions.
Record Synapse IDs, genome build, and exact task versions in the constructed dataset manifest.

recommended_axes.name: motif_disruption
recommended_axes.definition: Similarity over disrupted TF motif families or motif-delta profiles.

recommended_axes.name: cell_type_regulatory_context
recommended_axes.definition: Cell-type or assay context distance based on regulatory profiles.

recommended_axes.name: gc_kmer_control
recommended_axes.definition: GC/CpG/k-mer composition similarity used as a control axis, not a terminal mechanism.

useful_for: Auditing DNA foundation models against regulatory-context shifts.
Testing whether model claims transfer to counterfactual variant-effect tasks.
Hard agent-discovery benchmarks where external motif resources matter.
leakage_risks: GC or k-mer proxies can masquerade as biological regulatory mechanism.
